issues.sample: The Emergency Call Module Control Unit has now failed for the second time.  If the vehicle were to be involved in a crash, the system will not be able to automatically call for assistance. Vehicle is already subject to Audi service campaign 90T2 to reflash emergency call module c

Audi completed an over the air update and now the mmi screen reboots randomly, making it very dangerous when reversing using the backup camera and relying on parking sensors. Following navigation and it rebooting and having to utilize my cell phone making it difficult to also pay

narrative.headline: What 2020 Audi S5 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 25 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (56% of reports).
